tokens.s: Max. 10pcs parallel for on-grid and off-grid
Microgrid and generator function for versatile operations
Max. 36A PV input per MPPT, optimized for high-power
200% PV oversizing and up to 110% AC output
Low start-up voltage for more power generation
Type II SPD on AC&DC side
Smart loads management(e.g. heat pump, smart EV charger)
VPP ready with a variety of compatibility
*V2.3 Information may be subject to modify without notice.
The maximum input voltage is the upper limit of the DC voltage. Any higher input DC voltage would probably damage inverter
Compatible with a minimum of 3 units of HS series batteries, but if the total voltage of the 3 batteries is less than 127V and there is no PV input, the system will not able to startup
When the voltage is below 180V, the inverter will limit the battery current to less than 20A
Mains: III, Battery: II, PV: II
DC: Type II, AC: Type II
Over / under voltage protection, DC isolation protection, DC reverse-polarity protection, Grid monitoring, DC injection
Residual current detection, Over temperature protection, AC overcurrent
protection, AC short-circuit protection, Active anti-islanding method
No. of MPP trackers / Strings per MPP tracker
Max. input short circuit current per MPPT
